name: gitops_drift
prompt: Check if our ArgoCD applications are in sync and report any drift

recorded_responses.get_argo_applications:
NAMESPACE        NAME              SYNC     HEALTH    REPO
openshift-gitops frontend-app      Synced   Healthy   https://github.com/acme/k8s-manifests.git
openshift-gitops backend-api       OutOfSync Healthy   https://github.com/acme/k8s-manifests.git
openshift-gitops monitoring-stack  Synced   Degraded  https://github.com/acme/k8s-manifests.git
recorded_responses.get_argo_sync_diff:
--- a/apps/backend-api/deployment.yaml
+++ b/live
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
         image: backend-api:v2.1.0
-        resources:
-          requests:
-            cpu: 200m
-            memory: 512Mi
+        resources:
+          requests:
+            cpu: 500m
+            memory: 1Gi

--- a/apps/backend-api/configmap.yaml
+++ b/live
@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@
   LOG_LEVEL: info
+  DEBUG_MODE: "true"
recorded_responses.detect_gitops_drift:
Drift detected in 1 of 3 applications:

backend-api (OutOfSync):
  - Deployment/backend-api: resource requests manually increased (cpu: 200m->500m, memory: 512Mi->1Gi)
  - ConfigMap/backend-config: DEBUG_MODE=true added (not in git)

Recommendation: Either commit the resource changes to git or sync to revert to git state.
recorded_responses.get_events:
10m ago  Normal  Sync  Application/frontend-app  Sync completed
30m ago  Warning  OutOfSync  Application/backend-api  Drift detected: 2 resources differ from git
